owner: Zig — CRO Agent, Bookmarked Hermes Fleet
source_of_truth: HubSpot portal 39855019. All dashboard numbers are computed from live HubSpot deal data. No external spreadsheet, Google Sheet, or manual file feeds any calculation.

goal.name: $1M banked by Sept 1, 2026
goal.basis: Banked (Closed-Won) across all revenue pipelines since 2025-09-01
goal.notes: Only deals whose HubSpot close date lands before Sept 1, 2026 count toward the in-window / best-case math. FY27 deals (e.g. Utah, Levy) are real book but excluded from this goal.

new_business_texas.name: New Business — Texas
new_business_texas.notes: Primary Texas net-new pipeline. Source for the Deal Working dashboard.

renewals_2627.name: 26/27 Renewals
renewals_2627.notes: All paid 26/27 renewal deals. Source for the Renewals dashboard. Excludes ESC consortium ($0) renewals — those live in the separate Consortium pipeline.

new_business_out_of_state.name: New Business — Out of State
new_business_out_of_state.notes: Added to the dashboard 2026-06-22. Only in-window deals (close date < 2026-09-01) count toward the goal. As of 2026-06-24 that is Fort Vermilion AB ($6,148) only. Utah SEA ($1,312,622, Jan 2027) and Levy County FL ($15,000, Mar 2027) are FY27 — real book, excluded from the Sept-1 goal. OOS stage IDs are NOT reliably exposed via the API; all three real deals are shown in the earliest stage labeled 'Qualifying (OOS — verify)'. Re-pull stage IDs from REST before trusting OOS stage placement (one observed: 131248191).

renewals_consortium.name: Renewals — Consortium
renewals_consortium.notes: ~25+ ESC 9/15/16 child districts, currently $0. Excluded from all three dashboards. ~59 active $0 consortium districts renewed 25/26 but have no 26/27 deal — that is a known migration/structure gap (Nathan/ESC 16 decision), NOT a data error. Never treat 'no 26/27 deal' as 'not a customer'.

renewals_testing_pilot.name: Renewals — Testing & Pilot
renewals_testing_pilot.notes: Test/pilot records. Excluded from all calculations.

new_business_testing.name: New Business — Testing
new_business_testing.notes: Old sandbox pipeline polluted with 2023 'Testing:' junk now showing as Closed Lost (~$366K) / Closed Won (~$81K incl. 'Testing: Abilene' $61K). ALWAYS excluded from banked. Archive these test records.

esc_partnerships.name: ESC Partnerships
esc_partnerships.notes: Separate partnership-native motion. Not part of the revenue forecast. Stages: Initial Discussion 121094251 -> Qualified to Partner 121094252 -> Meeting Scheduled 121094253 -> Verbal Commitment to Partner 121094254 -> Contract sent 121094255 -> Closed Won 121094256 -> Closed Lost 121094257.

renewals_2728.name: 27/28 Renewals
renewals_2728.notes: FY28 renewals + multi-year Year-N PO-tracking deals (e.g. Conroe Year 2). NOT migrated to the new shared spine — still old stages. Excluded from the Sept-1 goal.

renewals_2526_historical.name: 25/26 Renewals (historical)
renewals_2526_historical.notes: Historical/closed. Closed/Won stage 1008389048, Churn stage 1008389049. Use to identify the $0 consortium customer base, not for forecast. NOT migrated to new spine.

renewals_2425_historical.name: 24/25 Renewals (historical)
renewals_2425_historical.notes: Historical/closed. NOT migrated to new spine.

deal_properties_queried.dealname: Display name. Naming convention for renewals: 'YY/YY RENEWAL | District Name [optional suffix]'; multi-year appends '(Year N of Nyr MY)'.
deal_properties_queried.amount: Deal dollar value. Renewal amounts are intentionally conservative (NOT bumped to $3/student) — pricing flex preserved.
deal_properties_queried.closedate: Expected/actual close date. Drives banked (must be >= 2025-09-01 and stage = Closed Won) and best-case (open deal close date < 2026-09-01).
deal_properties_queried.dealstage: Stage ID — mapped to a weight via the stage_weightings table below. Stage IDs differ per pipeline.
deal_properties_queried.pipeline: Pipeline ID — determines which pipeline a deal belongs to.
deal_properties_queried.hubspot_owner_id: Owner. Mapped to names via owner_ids table. Always map from verified IDs; never infer from context.
deal_properties_queried.dealtype: CFO (Michelle) owns this per-deal. Enum: New Business, Existing Business, Pilot, Consortium, Testing, Region Center Partnership. Used for the 'Testing' exclusion. Do NOT change its options.
deal_properties_queried.hs_deal_stage_probability: HubSpot's own stored win-probability per stage. NOTE: Jan's dashboards do NOT use this field — they apply the fixed stage_weightings table below. The two diverge (see stage_weightings.divergence_flag).

stage_weightings.description: Fixed win-probability weights Jan's Claude applies to each open deal for the Weighted Forecast. Keyed by stage label (consistent across the 6 revenue pipelines). Stage IDs differ per pipeline — see stage_ids_by_pipeline.
stage_weightings.unmapped_early_verify_note: Provisional 20% applied to deals sitting in an unmapped stage with no spine label (New Business-Texas stage 3879394040 — Tomball, San Benito, Lovejoy, ~$22K). This is a DATA-QUALITY placeholder, not a real stage weight. Correct these deals' stage in HubSpot and the placeholder disappears.

quote_requested_stage.recommendation: Quote Requested logically sits between Decision-Maker Buy-In (0.50) and Quote Sent (0.65) — a customer has asked for a quote but it has not yet been sent. Suggest ~0.55–0.60 pending Jan's decision. Do NOT apply a weight until Jan confirms. Jan's existing dashboards (through 2026-06-24) do not yet use this stage.

divergence_flag.issue: Jan's dashboard weights differ from the live win-probabilities Zig set inside HubSpot during the 2026-06-22 restructure.
divergence_flag.stage_order: Qualifying / V2 Review/Demo / Decision-Maker Buy-In / Quote Sent / Committed / PO Received / Closed Won / Closed Lost / Parked/Revisit
divergence_flag.resolution: These tables MUST be reconciled before Zig automates, or banked+weighted numbers will not match Jan's published dashboards. Jan's dashboard table (this config) is what produced the published $738,991 weighted forecast. Recommend Zig either (a) adopt Jan's dashboard weights as canonical, or (b) get Jan to ratify the HubSpot win-probs and re-baseline. Flag to Jan via Slack.

stage_ids_by_pipeline.other_pipelines_note: Consortium (2365820611), Renewals-Testing (2366316271), OOS (67437740), NB-Testing (41834638) use the same labels with pipeline-specific stage IDs. Re-pull from REST /crm/v3/pipelines/deals before trusting. OOS stage IDs are unreliable via the API.

exclusion_rules.reason: Sandbox/test records (e.g. Canyon ISD $17K, Splendora ISD $7.8K, Testing: Abilene $61K). Excluded from ALL calculations including banked.
Entire pipeline is non-real. Excluded from banked and forecast.

Deliberately deferred (REVISIT AFTER SEPT 2026), contingent on V1->V2 migration parity. Not at-risk, not lost. Killeen, Belton, Argyle, Dalhart, Temple (~$78,734). Excluded from open pipeline AND weighted forecast; shown separately.
Lost. Excluded from open and banked. This cycle: Dripping Springs $15,694, New Braunfels $8,899, Smithville $2,751.
Real book but outside the $1M-by-Sept-1 window. Excluded from in-window/best-case math (Utah $1,312,622, Levy $15,000). Still shown in total open book.
$0 consortium child districts; separate structure decision. Excluded from the three dashboards.

exclusion_rules.condition: known abandoned/$2 test records in OOS
exclusion_rules.reason: Jefferson County FL ($1,500 abandoned), Jefferson Monticello / Wyoming City / McAlester ($2 test deals). Excluded.

e.g. Jefferson County FL had two records ($2 and $1,500) — keep canonical, exclude dupe. [DUPE]-tagged deals are auto-created without dedup by the Hubspot_Code_MCP app + 'RENEWAL Deal Creation' workflow.

Review case-by-case. Some $0 are VALID (Krum ISD $0 is intentional — former founder, never flag as a gap; consortium $0 districts are valid customers). $0 deals contribute $0 to weighted/banked math regardless, so they do not distort totals.

banked_revenue.formula: SUM(amount) WHERE dealstage = 'Closed Won' AND closedate >= 2025-09-01, across all real revenue pipelines (excludes Testing pipelines and any Testing: deals).
banked_revenue.includes: Conroe 3-Yr multi-year Year-1 ($206,785 — ~55% of banked), plus all other Closed-Won since 2025-09-01.
banked_revenue.notes: Banked = 'in the bank', the headline goal metric. No weighting applied (already won = 100%).

weighted_forecast.formula: Banked + SUM(open_deal.amount * stage_weight) for all open deals across included pipelines.
weighted_forecast.notes: The 'working number'. Each open deal counted at the win-probability of its current stage — no manual overrides.

high_confidence_floor.formula: Banked + (Committed + PO Received open deals * their stage weight).
high_confidence_floor.notes: Only the most advanced open stages contribute.

best_case.formula: Banked + SUM(open_deal.amount) for every open deal whose closedate < 2026-09-01 (counted at 100%, NOT weighted).
best_case.notes: $908,377 of open pipeline had an in-window close date on 2026-06-22. Deals with no close date (Copperas Cove, Erath Excels) CANNOT be placed in best-case.

ceiling.formula: Banked + ALL open pipeline at 100% (no weighting, no date filter).
ceiling.notes: Theoretical max if everything open closes.

total_pipeline_open.formula: SUM(open_deal.amount) across included pipelines, excluding Parked/Revisit.
total_pipeline_open.notes: Excludes the $1,327,622 FY27 OOS book from the headline; total open book incl. all OOS = $2,396,316.

weighted_open.formula: SUM(open_deal.amount * stage_weight). Equals weighted_forecast minus banked.

edge_cases.conroe_multi_year: Conroe ISD signed a 3-year deal ($206,784.60). Year-1 is Closed-Won and counts in banked (~55% of it). Year-2/Year-3 are PO-tracking deals in the 27/28 pipeline (Year 2 id 323074610930), NOT real renewals — do not treat as at-risk. Classified as dealtype = Renewal (no separate Multi-Year type).
edge_cases.zero_dollar_consortium: Valid customers, not gaps. ~59 active $0 ESC 9/15/16 districts have no 26/27 deal — a structure decision, not an error. Contribute $0 to math.
edge_cases.krum_zero: Krum ISD $0 renewal is INTENTIONAL (former founder). Never flag as a data gap.
edge_cases.renewal_pricing_conservative: Renewal amounts intentionally NOT bumped to $3/student. Pricing undecided ($1.50/$2/$3). Do not propose bulk amount update.
edge_cases.banked_vs_inflight: Banked = Closed Won since 2025-09-01 (100%, in the bank). In-flight = open deals, counted at stage weight for weighted forecast or at 100% for best-case if in-window.
edge_cases.no_close_date: Open deals with no closedate (Copperas Cove $11,642, Erath Excels $170) are in weighted forecast but CANNOT enter best-case (pre-Sept-1) math. Set close dates in HubSpot.
edge_cases.date_conventions_renewals: contract_start = previous closedwon contract_end + 1 day; contract_end = contract_start + 1 year (minus 1 day); closedate = day before contract_start.

data_quality_flags_2026_06_24: Unmapped stage 3879394040 (NB-Texas): Tomball, San Benito, Lovejoy (~$22K) — provisional 20%, fix stage in HubSpot.

Stage-ID reuse from restructure silently relabeled 5 active NB-Texas deals into Parked/Revisit (1214475888, old 'Ready for Quote'): Northside $25K, Carrollton-Farmers Branch $22K, Harlingen $15K, Waco $12K, Granbury $7K — should be Decision-Maker Buy-In.
2 renewals tagged 'Testing': Canyon ISD $17K, Splendora ISD $7.8K — exclude.
2 renewals with no close date: Copperas Cove, Erath Excels.
Krum renewal $0 — valid, do not flag.
OOS stage IDs unreliable via API — all 3 real deals forced to earliest stage label.

refresh_process.current: Manual. Jan asks her Claude Desktop to pull live HubSpot data via the HubSpot MCP and rebuild the three HTML dashboards on demand (typically before pipeline/renewal meetings). No fixed schedule; triggered by Jan. Weekly Thursday renewals report to Steve + Michelle (cashflow focus, lead with Committed + banked).
refresh_process.target: Zig runs a daily cron at 06:00 CT, pulls HubSpot, applies this config, writes data/sales-data.json, auto-publishes docs/index.html, writes CHANGELOG, updates Confluence.

output_locations.future: This repo: data/sales-data.json (data), docs/index.html (GitHub Pages dashboard).

design_tokens.fonts: DM Sans (body), DM Serif Display (headings), DM Mono (numbers)
design_tokens.source_of_truth: bookmarked-os repo: claude-output/design/bookmarked-brand.css (CEO-locked; do not improvise styling)
